issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {East Blue} type, not if a card with that name is on board.
For LeaderHasType condition, use 'type' field not 'name'. Should reference the type value 'East Blue'.
Action type should be 'GiveDon' not 'AttachDon'. The effect gives DON!! from opponent's cost area to opponent's Characters, not attaching to your own board.
Target scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. The action selects up to 1 opponent Character to give DON to.
